title: pkg/namespaces: add tests for UsernsMode and NetworkMode
body:
## What
Add unit tests for the UsernsMode and NetworkMode methods in pkg/namespaces.
These parse the --userns / --network mode strings and had no test coverage.

## Why
The methods parse user-supplied "mode:options" input (keep-id options, ns:<path>,
container:<id>, pasta, user-defined names, etc.). Tests lock the parsing and
predicate behavior in.
